name: Crystal Bears

wingLaw.appliesWhen: any cast member has isBee=true in canon/characters.json

_note: T30 Phase 3 manifest — describes where this show's tenant content lives under shows/crystal-bears/. The engine currently reads these paths via engine/paths.py's hardcoded SHOW resolution (env STUDIO_SHOW, default crystal-bears), not by parsing this file at runtime yet — this profile documents the contract paths.py implements and is the target for a future profile-loader (Phase 3's full acceptance criterion: STUDIO_SHOW=<other> starts the engine and fails only on missing content, never on Crystal-Bears assumptions baked into code). That full genericization (removing bee/crystal/Five-Pillars vocabulary from the engine's prompt-building logic itself, not just its file paths) is deliberately NOT done in this pass — it is real creative-logic surgery across cb_director.py/cb_prompts.py/cb_qa.py, a materially bigger and riskier undertaking than relocating files, scoped as future work.
